Scene.title: Resistance
Scene.description: Priya and Tony return to help Stella research octopus weaknesses

DialogueBlock.Speaker: STELLA
DialogueBlock.Line: What are you doing here? Tony! You're okay!

DialogueBlock.Speaker: TONY
DialogueBlock.Line: My stomach hurts but I think that's the sugar. I'm starting to think it's not the best for you.

DialogueBlock.Speaker: PRIYA
DialogueBlock.Line: Tony came and got me. He told me everything.

DialogueBlock.Speaker: STELLA
DialogueBlock.Line: You found out?

DialogueBlock.Speaker: PRIYA
DialogueBlock.Line: You were right.

DialogueBlock.Speaker: TONY
DialogueBlock.Line: He's an octopus.

DialogueBlock.Speaker: PRIYA
DialogueBlock.Line: And a dick. I'm sorry I was a chode. I was wrong.

DialogueBlock.Speaker: STELLA
DialogueBlock.Line: I know that was hard for you Priya.

DialogueBlock.Speaker: PRIYA
DialogueBlock.Line: Thanks. Seriously though. I was a chode. We're running out of time. I think Greg made a shank in art class today.

Page.StageDirection: SQUISH is making a paper mache knife in Art. MISS DUANE is walking past, on her phone.

DialogueBlock.Speaker: DUANE
DialogueBlock.Line: Greg, that doesn't look like a dreamcatcher to me. What have you got there?

DialogueBlock.Speaker: GREG
DialogueBlock.Line: Christmas tree.

DialogueBlock.Speaker: DUANE
DialogueBlock.Line: Well, look, it's not what I asked you to make, so I can't give you a gold star. This will have to do.

Page.StageDirection: She puts a happy rainbow sticker on his fake head.

DialogueBlock.Speaker: DUANE
DialogueBlock.Line: Now put it away or it'll be mine. [off] Jordan. Head out of the kiln now buddy. I won't say it again.

DialogueBlock.Speaker: STELLA
DialogueBlock.Line: Thanks you guys. I just wish it wasn't me.

DialogueBlock.Speaker: PRIYA
DialogueBlock.Line: So do we. But you know what? It is. And there's nothing you can do about it but fight back. You're in control here. Look at me.

DialogueBlock.Speaker: PRIYA
DialogueBlock.Line: You're going to fight that butthole tomorrow. And we're going to help you.

DialogueBlock.Speaker: TONY
DialogueBlock.Line: We're not going to let our bud get smacked around by an octopus.

Page.StageDirection: PRIYA sets up her easel and drawing pad. She flips through her research as she continues. Old oil paintings of whaling ships being attacked by giant squids. A photo of an octopus eating a bird. Giant Krakens, squids, Cthulhu, the octopus that predicted the World Cup.

DialogueBlock.Speaker: PRIYA
DialogueBlock.Line: I've gone to the library and did some research —

DialogueBlock.Speaker: TONY
DialogueBlock.Line: Nerd.
Sorry. Habit.

DialogueBlock.Speaker: PRIYA
DialogueBlock.Line: — And everything that has been happening actually makes sense. This isn't the first time that somebody's been victimised by octopuses. There's a really long history of it. Ships being overturned by sea monsters. Whales disappearing. Entire cults devoted to them. They can fit through cracks. They camouflage. They use tools. What do you think that means?

DialogueBlock.Speaker: STELLA
DialogueBlock.Line: I don't know.

DialogueBlock.Speaker: PRIYA
DialogueBlock.Line: I think it's been building up to something. Something big. Tony?

DialogueBlock.Speaker: TONY
DialogueBlock.Line: We did some research —

DialogueBlock.Speaker: STELLA
DialogueBlock.Line: We?

DialogueBlock.Speaker: TONY
DialogueBlock.Line: Me and a friend.

DialogueBlock.Speaker: PRIYA
DialogueBlock.Line: We're your friends.

DialogueBlock.Speaker: TONY
DialogueBlock.Line: I have a life outside of you guys.

Page.StageDirection: We found this on YouTube. Some Grade Five kid in Russia took it, it was a fight at his school. The bigger kid kind of looks like Greg.
He shows STELLA the video. We hear kids yelling in Russian, scuffling.
We thought it was just another fight, but then ...

DialogueBlock.Speaker: STELLA
DialogueBlock.Line: He ate him!

DialogueBlock.Speaker: PRIYA
DialogueBlock.Line: They're getting bolder. There's more videos just like that one from all over the world. It's not just you, Stella. It's kids like you and it's happening everywhere and nobody's standing up to them. You have to stop him.

DialogueBlock.Speaker: STELLA
DialogueBlock.Line: But why me?!

DialogueBlock.Speaker: PRIYA
DialogueBlock.Line: You're still on this? It doesn't matter why. It is you, yeah, but if it wasn't you, it would be somebody else.

Page.StageDirection: As PRIYA continues, a horrifying vision of multiple GREGS appear all around them in the darkness.

DialogueBlock.Speaker: PRIYA
DialogueBlock.Line: And if you were in his position, you'd bully other kids too. Think about it. If you were bigger and stronger, of course you'd pick on somebody who wouldn't fight back. People have been doing that ever since there have been people. And he won't stop with you. He'll keep doing it until every octopus in the world isn't scared anymore, and then our mums and dads and brothers and sisters will all be in trouble. We're not going to let that happen.

Page.StageDirection: TONY puts his hand to his ear and makes a 'ring ring' sound.

DialogueBlock.Speaker: STELLA
DialogueBlock.Line: Tony, what are you doing?

DialogueBlock.Speaker: TONY
DialogueBlock.Line: Just a second. Hello? [answering his fake phone] it's Destiny calling. [listens and then hands her his imaginary phone] It's for you.

DialogueBlock.Speaker: STELLA
DialogueBlock.Line: I don't know how I can win on my own.

DialogueBlock.Speaker: TONY
DialogueBlock.Line: Have you even been listening? You're not on your own.

DialogueBlock.Speaker: PRIYA
DialogueBlock.Line: I've got an idea to help you, it'll take a lot of luck and every bit of my STEM skills but I think it's the best plan we have.

DialogueBlock.Speaker: TONY
DialogueBlock.Line: And I brought Sour Patch Kids.

DialogueBlock.Speaker: PRIYA
DialogueBlock.Line: We'll need them. It's going to be a long night.
